title: Calcite Variants
description: Adds calcite slabs, stairs, and optionally vertical slabs
body:
Adds calcite slabs, stairs, and walls.

Optionally, depend on the [Vertical Slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/lexwomy_vertical_slabs) mod to include calcite vertical slabs. Note that if vertical slabs is not present, any vertical slabs will be deleted on world load.
